remember: Recall the types of floral diagrams and their importance in understanding plant anatomy
Identify the male and female reproductive organs in a flower
Mention the different types of male and female reproductive organs in plants
understand: Explain the role of the stigma, style, and ovary in the process of fertilization
Describe the process of pollination and its importance in plant reproduction
Describe the different types of pollination (self-pollination and cross-pollination)
apply: Explain the process of double fertilization in angiosperms
Describe the development of endosperm and embryo in angiosperms
Explain the process of fertilization in angiosperms
analyze: Compare and contrast the reproductive strategies of angiosperms and gymnosperms
Discuss the importance of pollination in plant reproduction and crop production

ncert_objectives: Explain the structure and functions of different parts of the flower.
Explain the types of pollination and fertilization in flowering plants.
Explain the process of double fertilization and the development of endosperm and embryo in angiosperms.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the structure and functions of different parts of the flower.
Describe the process of pollination and fertilization in flowering plants.
Explain the process of double fertilization and the development of endosperm and embryo in angiosperms.
